background: There are two hospitals in a town. On average 45 babies are born each day in the larger hospital, and 15 in the smaller. The probability of a baby being a boy is about 0.52, and the probability of twins is about 0.012.

task.query: Which hospital is more likely to have a set of twins delivered on any day?
task.answer: The larger hospital, simply because there are more births.

task.query: Which hospital is more likely to have more than 60% of babies being boys on any day?
task.answer: The day to day variation in the proportion of boys will be greater in the smaller hospital, so it is more likely to have more than 60% of babies being boys on any day.
